heading: Full-time board-certified physicians and dentists: reimbursement of continuing professional education expenses
label: 7411 Full-time board-certified physicians and dentists: reimbursement of continuing professional education expenses
text: The Secretary shall reimburse any full-time board-certified physician or dentist appointed under for expenses incurred, up to $1,000 per year, for continuing professional education.section 7401(1) of this title
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–40, title I, § 103(b)105 Stat. 199May 7, 1991“, United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to expenses incurred for continuing professional education that is pursued after .”Section 7411 of title 38September 30, 1991
